name: Neon MCP
description: Official Neon MCP server for creating and managing serverless Postgres databases from AI coding agents. Full SQL, branching, schema operations, and pgvector support.

skills.name: Database Creation
skills.description: Create new Neon serverless Postgres databases and branches directly from an AI agent via MCP

skills.name: SQL Query
skills.description: Execute SQL queries, DDL statements, and transactions against Neon Postgres via MCP tools

skills.name: Database Branching
skills.description: Create instant Neon database branches for dev and testing without copying data or extra cost

skills.name: Schema Operations
skills.description: Inspect and modify table schemas, indexes, and constraints in Neon databases via MCP tools
